Idioma.AYUDA_CierraElPeriodoDeEvaluacionDeUnaRe: Closes the Period of Evaluation of a Relation
Idioma.AYUDA_HabilitaUnaEvaluacionEstoImplicaQu: Enable an Evaluation, this Implies that from the Period of Force, the Same one will be able to be Evaluated Until the Date in which is Permitted to Evaluate, or Until be Closed.
Idioma.MSG_DebeContenerSolamenteCaracteresAlfan: Should Contain Only Alfanumerical Characters and the Following Signs
Idioma.MSG_DebeSeleccionarAlMenosUnRegistroPara: Should Select at least a Registration to Realize this Action
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEliminarLaRelacion: Do you Want to Eliminate the Relation
Idioma.MSG_DeseaFinalizarLasRelacionesMarcadas: Do you Desire to Finalize the Marked Relations
Idioma.MSG_DeseaMarcarComoListasParaSerEvaluada: Do you Desire to Mark as Ready to be Evaluated the Marked Evaluations
Idioma.MSG_PrecaucionEstaRelacionYacontieneResu: Warning This Relation Already Contains Results Do you Desire to Eliminate it
Idioma.LB_SeleccioneLosCriteriosParaAgregarEmpl: Select the Criteria to Add Employees to the Relation
Idioma.MSG_EstaOficinaDepartamentoYaFueAgregada: This Office Department Already was Aggregate
Idioma.MSG_EstaSeguroQueDeseaContinuarYPerderLa: Are you sure that Desires to Continue and Lose the Present Configuration
Idioma.MSG_EsteCentroFuncionalYaFueAgregado: This Functional Center Already was Aggregated
Idioma.CHK_MostrarSoloEmpleadosCuyoPuestoNoTien: Show Only Employees Whose Position does not Have Items to Evaluate
Idioma.MSG_EstoPorqueParaElPuestoEnQueSeEncuent: This Because for the Position in which is Found do not Exist Items Neither by Ability or Knowledge
Idioma.MSG_GenerarEvaluadoresEItemsParaEsteEmpl: Generate Evaluators The Item for this Employee
Idioma.MSG_IndicaQueParaEsteEmpleqadoNoSeHaPodi: Indicates that for this Employee has not been able to be Generated Any Item
Idioma.MSG_NOSEHANAGREGADOEMPLEADOSAEVALUARPARA: THEY HAVE NOT AGGREGATED EMPLOYEES TO EVALUATE FOR THIS RELACION
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEliminarElEvaluadorDeLaListaDeE: Do you Desire to Eliminate The Evaluator of the List of Evaluators of this Employee
Idioma.MSG_EliminarHabilidadRequeridaParaEstePu: Eliminate Ability Required For This Position
Idioma.MSG_EsteEvaluadorYaEstaAgregadoALaListaD: This Evaluator is Already Aggregate to the List of Evaluators of this Employee Cannot Add it More than Once
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEliminarDeLaEvaluacionLosEvalua: Do you Desire to Eliminate of The Evaluation the Evaluators Marked Only will be Eliminated For The Employee that be Found in the List and not for the Others Employees that be Found Evaluating
Idioma.MSG_LaInformacionDelEmpleadoAEvaluarAyud: The Information of the Employee to Evaluate Helped to Find the Employee of Which Desires to Identify Its Evaluators
Idioma.MSG_NOSEHANAGREGADOEVALUADORESPARAESTARE: THERE'S NOT EVALUATORS FOR THIS RELATION HAS BEEN AGGREGATED
Idioma.LB_SeleccioneUnEmpleadoAlQueDeseaAgregar: Select An Employee that Desire to Add Evaluators
